props.name: text
props.description: The text content to display and eventually animate.

props.name: highlightWords
props.description: List of words or substrings to apply a highlight style.

props.name: highlightClass
props.description: CSS class name for highlighted words.

props.name: backgroundColor
props.description: Canvas background color for the physics world.

props.name: wireframes
props.description: Whether to render the physics bodies in wireframe mode.

props.name: gravity
props.description: Vertical gravity factor for the physics engine.

props.name: mouseConstraintStiffness
props.description: Stiffness for the mouse drag constraint.

props.name: fontSize
props.description: Font size applied to the text before it falls.
